description: Using the dataset 'BFI25.csv' in '~/Documents/Jamovi/', perform a Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test comparing the paired Extraversion items 'E1' and 'E2'. Include descriptives and the rank biserial correlation effect size in the analysis. Save the Jamovi project to '~/Documents/Jamovi/WilcoxonSignedRank.omv'. Record the Wilcoxon W statistic, the p-value, and the effect size in '~/Documents/Jamovi/wilcoxon_results.txt', with each value on its own line.
